metadata.title: AqXen Reputation System
metadata.description: AqXen Socials is the social platform built for organizations to track, recognize, and celebrate the productive achievements that drive real growth.

home.heading: Where Positive Actions Beam
home.description: AqXen Socials is the social platform built for organizations to track, recognize, and celebrate the productive achievements that drive real growth.

about.heading: The AqXen Ecosystem's Commitment to Progress
about.description: AqXen Socials was created as a core component of the AqXen Ecosystem with one driving mission: to make positive contribution visible, measurable, and rewarding. We believe that when people are recognized for doing, they are motivated to do more.
about.whatAreBeamsDescription: A 'Beam' is recognition by your peers for a productive action you've taken and posted about. It's not a like or a share, it's genuine recognition for moving the needle. Every Beam you give or receive contributes to a verifiable, positive reputation score within your community. This score isn't based on popularity; it's based on action.
about.whoIsItForDescription: We empower non-profits, corporate teams, educational institutions, and community groups to cultivate environments where every member feels valued, understood, and motivated by a clear, shared vision.
about.ctaHeading: Learn how to integrate AqXen Socials into your organization's strategy.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Find answers to common questions about AqXen Socials.
faq.q1Title: What is AqXen Socials and the AqXen Stream?
faq.q1Content: AqXen Socials is a positive social media platform where users post content that illustrates the productive actions they've taken to further their organization's goals. The AqXen Stream is a curated stream of these positive contributions, free from clutter and negativity. Through 'Beams' they receive recognition for their actions and are rewarded with positive reinforcement by their peers.
faq.q2Title: What are Beams and how do I get them?
faq.q2Content: A Beam is a unit of peer to peer recognition. You get Beams when others in your organization's community acknowledge and validate your productive posts. The more your actions shine, the higher your Beam count, and the stronger your reputation amongst your peers.
faq.q3Content:
Yes! The 5 Types of Beams we've identified as most significant to meaningful interactions for near or long distance collaboration are the following, in no particular order:
1. Participation: The degree of activity achieved through various types of virtual and real world presence a member of a community objectively demonstrates. This metric may translate into engagement and interest, as well as likelihood of overall awareness of the community's direction, function, and purpose.
2. Responsibility: The degree to which a member is able to take on and accomplish key tasks and objectives. This metric may reveal a member's skill set and ability to execute on assigned or volunteered tasks.
3. Reliability: The degree to which a member delivers tasks whether assigned or volunteered in a timely and consistent manner. This metric may show a member's ability to be counted on and tendency to live up to their commitments.
4. Transparency: The degree to which a member is willing to show their work, prove their assertions, and empower others with the means to verify terms and actions. This metric can be seen as an objective demonstration of the member's honesty.
5. Charity: The degree to which a member volunteers or contributes their time, energy, funds, knowledge, network, or their other assets without expecting anything in return. This metric could be viewed as an attempt at encapsulating and recognizing the nature of members to donate and help others.
faq.q4Title: What are the benefits of unlocking access?
faq.q4Content: Unlocking access allows your organization to create a dedicated, private community space (your "Ecosystem"), manage members, issue custom organizational badges, and gain access to detailed analytics on community productivity and engagement as these features are released.
faq.q5Title: Is AqXen Socials part of the AqXen Ecosystem?
faq.q5Content: Yes, AqXen Socials is a foundational element of the AqXen Ecosystem, focusing on translating positive real-world contributions into a verifiable digital reputation score.
faq.q6Title: Can individuals join without an organization?
faq.q6Content: Individuals can apply to join and participate in any public or open-access organization that uses AqXen Socials. To create and manage a dedicated private community, unlocking organizational access is required.
faq.q7Content: Positivity and productivity are reciprocated. Building a publicly accesible reputation profile around your positive, mutually valued contributions is a meaningful way of becoming part of an ecosystem striving to race to the top, creating networks of like-minded people willing to work towards furthering their shared interests. As the ecosystem grows organizations within it and outside of it will incentivize AqXen Ecosystem members in their own ways, leading to a community of increasing and growing value.
faq.q8Content: Yes! More utility will be given to Beams as we introduce further decentralization and open up more systems within AqXen Eco, introducing governance features, liquidity provision, special access and unlocks, as well as rewards tied to staking and revenue generation. We value our community!
faq.q9Content:
We leverage blockchain technology to ensure we are building on a solid, stable, and secure foundation giving us the ability to own who we are, and never lose our accomplishments or be censored.
You are responsible for who you become.
Currently, we believe the Vaulta Network aligns best with our values and meets our security and scaling needs.
AqXen Eco is open-source and auditable.
We believe in holding each other accountable and building our community together.
faq.q10Content:
AqXen Socials has outlined upcoming features in development phases, including:
Access & User Experience: Implement Passkey integration and email registration to lower the barrier to entry, and deploy advanced search capabilities with media support for rich content feeds.
Community Features: Encrypted organizations for privacy, tiered access with premium custom beams, and NFT profile headers linked to marketplace trading.
Smart Contract Upgrades: Calendar-based beam cycles and exponential claim functions that scale rewards with community growth.
Tokenomics & Multichain: A native token launch with referral systems, liquidity for multiple assets, and IBC bridge functionality for cross-chain capabilities.
Governance Evolution: Final transition where representatives take the lead on community-run initiatives, moving toward decentralized governance and operational autonomy.
faq.q11Content:
Account Setup: Log in or create an account to begin.
Creating an Organization: Founders select desired member positions, fill required fields, and pay monthly subscription costs in EOS tokens based on org size.
Organization Features: Admins can establish Seasons (time-limited events) and design Badges earned through reputation or beam collection.
Joining Communities: Prospective members can request to join organizations matching their interests, then post contributions to gain recognition through peer-awarded beams and build reputation.

contact.heading: Let's Connect
contact.description: We're here to help you understand how AqXen Socials can transform your community's productivity and positivity. Reach out with any questions about unlocking access, features, or partnership opportunities.

pricing.manageDescription: Renew your subscription, adjust your seat count, or add more members to your organization
pricing.createDescription: Launch your organization on AqXen to create badge series, recognize achievements, and build reputation — all backed by blockchain
pricing.defaultDescription: Create your organization to issue blockchain-backed badges, track achievements, and grow your community's reputation
pricing.unpaidCycleWarning: Your organization has not paid for the current billing cycle. Purchase member seats below to keep your members able to recognize one another.
pricing.allSeatsUsedWarning: All member seats are in use. Purchase additional seats below to invite more members to your organization.

stream.heading: Stream
stream.heroHeading: Welcome to the AqXen Stream: Progress in Action
stream.heroDescription: The first social activity stream focused purely on celebrating achievements and driving organizational success.
stream.noiseDescription: Unlike other platforms, the AqXen Stream is designed to be motivating, not distracting. You will only see posts aligned with your interests, validated with 'Beams' from your colleagues, teammates, or fellow community member. All focused on positive steps toward shared goals.
stream.whatYoullFind1: 1. Real-Time Recognition: See who is making an impact, right now.
stream.whatYoullFind2: 2. Community Goals: Posts are tied to measurable objectives.
stream.whatYoullFind3: 3. Reputation Tally: Instantly see your Beams and reputation score grow.
stream.ctaButton: Log in to the AqXen Stream
stream.postPlaceholder: Share what you've accomplished that's contributed value to your community.
stream.noPostsMessage: No posts available. Be the first to create one!
stream.loginRequiredPost: You must be logged in to create a post
stream.loginRequiredAnnouncement: You must be logged in to create an announcement

beamsPage.title: Beams
beamsPage.enableDescription: Enable beams to create all template badges for your organization.
beamsPage.cycleLengthError: Cycle length must be a positive number
beamsPage.supplyError: Supply per cycle must be a positive number

badgesPage.title: Badges
badgesPage.tooltip: Manage your community's badge library. View, edit, or archive existing badges available for users to earn.

newBadge.title: New Badge
newBadge.tooltip: Create a new custom badge. Upload your design, set the title, and write the description for this achievement.

newBeam.title: New Beam
newBeam.tooltip: Create a new cycle-based beam badge

badgeAutomation.title: Badges Automation
badgeAutomation.tooltip: Monitor your active automation rules that instantly distribute badges to users when they hit certain milestones.

newBadgeAutomation.title: New Badge Automation
newBadgeAutomation.tooltip: Set up a new automated trigger. Define the exact user actions or point thresholds required to automatically unlock a specific badge.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.tooltip: View your current subscription plan, track your platform usage limits, and manage your billing cycle.

seasonsPage.title: Seasons
seasonsPage.tooltip: Review your active and historical seasons. Seasons allow you to track and reset user reputation over set timeframes.

newSeason.title: New Season
newSeason.tooltip: Configure an upcoming season. Define the start and end dates, and set the specific engagement rules for this cycle.
newSeason.noBadges: No badges found for your organization.

seasonDetail.beamsTooltip: Cycle-based badge distribution linked to this season. Beams automatically award badges based on recurring engagement cycles.
seasonDetail.badgesTooltip: Standalone badges linked to this season. These are awarded manually or through automations independently of beam cycles.
seasonDetail.seriesTooltip: Time-bound periods within this season. Each series can include its own beams and badges, and tracks awards separately.

addSeriesPage.title: Add Series
addSeriesPage.startRightAway: Start the new series right away
